name: genaptic-skillsets-development
description: Research-led workflows for adding complete Agent Skills and independently installable skillpacks while preserving this repository's architecture, safety, eval, generation, and release guarantees.

interface.shortDescription: Author and validate skills and skillpacks for genaptic/skillsets.
interface.longDescription: Research-led workflows for adding complete Agent Skills and independently installable skillpacks while preserving this repository's architecture, safety, eval, generation, and release guarantees.
defaultPrompt: Use $genaptic-skillsets-create-skill to research, add, and verify one Agent Skill in an existing skillpack.
Use $genaptic-skillsets-create-skillpack to design, add, and verify one independently installable skillpack.
